THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRYANT, ROSEMARY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3214 BUCHANAN STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $3,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,000.00, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS, INCLUDING ATTORNEYS FEES, IN AN AMOUNT TO BE DETERMINED BY MEMORANDUM OF COSTS.
